meta.title: About Us | D'auchy.Studio
meta.description: Learn about D'auchy.Studio's company information, mission, values, team, and journey in AI innovation.

hero.title: About Us
hero.description: D'auchy.Studio develops products that harness the power of AI to enrich people's lives and work. We combine technology and creativity to provide truly valuable solutions as our mission.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We bring innovation to education, enterprise, and creative fields through AI technology. By valuing co-creation with users and developing practical and sustainable solutions, we contribute to the digital transformation of society as a whole.

items.title: Innovation
items.description: We provide innovative solutions that leverage cutting-edge AI technology to solve conventional challenges.

items.title: User-Centered
items.description: We deeply understand user needs and design and develop truly valuable experiences.

items.title: Creativity
items.description: We combine creative thinking and technology to open up new possibilities.

items.title: Sustainable Growth
items.description: Through continuous learning and improvement, we continue to create long-term value.

team.title: Team
team.description: Our expert team with rich experience working on innovative product development.

members.name: Shin Uchida
members.description: Builds all kinds of systems with over 30 years of experience.

members.name: Michael Ito
members.description: Provides proposals from system and app planning to operation.

members.name: John Kaneko
members.description: A guide who leads projects to success.

milestones.title: January 2024 - D'auchy Studio Founded
milestones.description: Founded D'auchy.Studio with the goal of democratizing AI technology.

milestones.title: March 2025 - Enterprise LLM Release
milestones.description: Released 'Enterprise LLM', an integrated enterprise platform combining project management, knowledge sharing, and AI assistant capabilities in an all-in-one solution.

milestones.title: May 2025 - LingaLink Release
milestones.description: Officially released 'LingaLink',  an online learning AI coaching service.

milestones.title: August 2025 - OfficeBrain Release
milestones.description: Released 'OfficeBrain', an enterprise RAG system. Entered the enterprise market.

milestones.title: October 2025 - Present
milestones.description: EduMate beta released, Bayd-System in development. More innovative products in preparation.
